darpaslittleprincess

item.title: Rory
item.description: Meet Rory Hu, the 7th grader who discovered a way to reverse the detrimental effects that pesticides have on honeybees. Without bees, our global food supply is at serious risk. When Hu learned about the global decline of honeybees, she wanted to learn more about why. Pesticides can damage honey bees’ learning and memory — and as a result, impaired bees can’t harvest pollen well and have a hard time finding their way back to the hive. With the help of a local beekeeper, Hu set out to experiment with a potential solution. She created artificial flowers saturated with caffeine and a food supplement called T-Polyphenol. Her experiment worked — the compounds used improve the bees’ memories and they began to thrive! Hu was awarded the Department of Defense STEM Talent Award of $10,000 for her experiment at the 2022 Broadcom MASTERS, a national science and engineering competition for middle school students. “Knowing that I would even be able to have a small part in [solving the problem],” she says, “it would be extremely gratifying to me.” Go Rory go! #WomenInSTEM #AAPIHeritageMonth
item.dc:creator: darpaslittleprincess

item.title: Bottom shelf mid life crisis dump.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. JOIN FOR THE MEME CHALLENGES: discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.dc:creator: CitizenK9

item.title: Fly
item.description: Women make up less than 20% of the workforce in most aviation occupations: Only 5% of pilots are women and women make up about 6% of airline CEOs. And Black female pilots make up just 1% of commercial airline pilots globally. Amidst these statistics, there’s a beacon of hope. In 2019, an all-women @Delta crew took to the skies with one mission: inspire young girls to chase their aviation dreams. The sky’s the limit when it comes to what women can achieve in this field. ✈️
item.dc:creator: darpaslittleprincess

item.title: Iranians celebrate the death of their evil leader
item.description: Impromptu fireworks across Iran celebrating the death of president Raisi in a helicopter crash. In the 1980s, he was a member of the Tehran Death Commission, which killed an estimated 30,000 political prisoners. More recently, as president, he led a savage crackdown to enforce the hijab law, which included mass executions of student protesters. He was widely seen as a leading candidate to be the next Ayatollah, or religious leader. He proudly carried the nickname “Butcher of Tehran.” He was an absolutely key player in the oppressive core of Iranian governance. Now he’s a smear on a mountainside and Iranians are celebrating. Iranians are celebrating the demise of the Butcher of Tehran. Burn in hell, bastard.
item.dc:creator: Huor

item.title: BTS of Matilda
item.description: Fun fact: Danny DeVito, who produced and directed Matilda, and his wife hosted the actress who played Matilda at their house for much of the movie. Her mother was diagnosed with cancer in the middle of filming, and Mara states that having the film to distract her and all of the cast and crew who treated her like family, really helped her with her mother's sickness. Her mom passed away a few months before the movie premiered, but Danny DeVito took an almost completed copy to her hospital and watched it with her shortly before she passed. DeVito and his wife Rhea Pearlman were like uncle and aunt to her.
item.dc:creator: ImpatientMoth

item.title: Randome Meme Dumpe Parte 271
item.description:
1
2
3
4. What a girl will do for a man like that
5
6
7. Mmmmm
8. No one: These kids:
9
10
11
12
13. When I tell her that I'm forklift certified
14
15. Hey friendos If you liked the humor of this dump I think you might like my wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game, called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)"! Please wishlist, it would really encourage me to finish it: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/ P. S. Have a great WEEK and and don't forget to hydrate and take care of yourself. Go on a hike if the weather is nice : )

item.title: Comet in Portugal
item.description: It appears that a brilliant fireball spotted by many people in Portugal and Spain lat night around 22:46 UTC, was a small piece of a comet. The European Space Agency (ESA) estimates that it flew over Spain and Portugal travelling at \~45 km/s before burning up over the Atlantic Ocean at an altitude of \~60 km. The likelihood of any meteorites being found is very low. Source: The European Space Agency
item.dc:creator: SnowPeas22

We
Made
It
To
Another
Monday.
Give
Yourself
An
Extra
Treat
Today
For
Doing
So
Well
At
Surviving
Once
In
A
Lifetime
Trauma
Every
Year
Or
Two.
I’ve
Been
Taking
Photos
Of
Mushrooms
On
Dog
Walks-
Would
That
Be
Something
Of
